sqlReaderQuery.value:
select t1.* from (
select ap.id
,ap.memberId
,ap.testId
,ap.score
,ap.reviewSteps
,ap.dateTaken
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateMastered
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DeleteDate
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateLastModified 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_TestResultHistory t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID

WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select  distinct 
ap.id
,ap.trialSetId
,ap.memberId
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.teachingStepId
,ap.isCorrectPrompt
,ap.promptCount
,ap.promptId
,ap.isCorrect
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.tblMember t on (ap.memberid=t.id)
inner join accountinfo a on (t.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_TrialSetDetails t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

select DISTINCT ap.id 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.tblMember t on (ap.memberid=t.id)
inner join accountinfo a on (t.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

select t1.* from (
select DISTINCT
ap.id
,ap.TrialSetId
,ap.LearningPromtId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.IsCorrect
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.TrialSet ap1 on ( ap1.id=ap.trialSetId   )
inner join dbo.childprofile b on (ap1.hollowchildprofileid=b.id  )
inner join  [dbo].[ChildProfileLessonTarget] c on (ap1.childProfileLessonTargetId=c.id  )
inner join accountinfo a on (b.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_TrialSetSelections t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

,ap.hollowSubscriberId
,ap.svsiNetAddr
,ap.svsiNetMask
,ap.svsiVideoSvrAddr
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.accountInfoId 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 	
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_VideoServerInfo t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID

WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select 
t.id
,t.Street1
,t.Street2
,t.City
,t.StateId
,t.Zip
,t.CountryId
,t.Town
,t.ModifiedBy
,t.DeletedBy
,t.CreatedBy
,t.DateDeleted
,t.DateLastModified
,t.DateCreated
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} t
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcStaffMember s
    JOIN tblMember m ON m.ID = s.tblMemberId
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = m.accountInfoId
    WHERE s.AddressId = t.id
    and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcFunder f
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = f.accountInfoId
     WHERE f.AddressId = t.id
     and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) )
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcChildProfileContacts cpc
    JOIN ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = cpc.childProfileId
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = cp.accountInfoId
    WHERE cpc.AddressId = t.id
    and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) )
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcChildProfileScheduleAssessment cpsa
    JOIN ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = cpsa.childProfileId
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = cp.accountInfoId
    WHERE cpsa.AddressId = t.id
    and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) )
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcProviderLocation pl
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON pl.accountInfoId = a.ID
    WHERE pl.AddressId = t.id
    and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)
)t1
left join Temp_hcAddress t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  --ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.AppointmentId

,ap.DateLastModified

,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.StartDate

inner join dbo.hcAppointments ha on (ap.AppointmentId=ha.AppointmentId )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ha.clientid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
 )t1

WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
